colors: [Red Green Blue]
colors.len: 3
colorNames: [Red Green Blue]
colorInts: [0 1 2]
statusVals: [pending done failed]
statusNames: [Pending Done Failed]
name(Red): "Red"
name(Green): "Green"
name(Blue): "Blue"
name(unknown): ""
status.name(Done): "Done"
parse(Green): 1 true <nil>
parse(Yellow).err: "Yellow": q: unknown enum value
parse(Yellow).is: true
status.parse(Done): done true <nil>
valid(Red): true
valid(99): false
status.valid(Done): true
status.valid(unknown): false
ord(Red): 0
ord(Green): 1
ord(Blue): 2
ord(99): -1
descs: [Red=0 Green=1 Blue=2]
color.String(): Red
status.String(): Failed
